// total recall, fully private

Search everything you've ever seen.

Mnema captures your screen, audio, and activity into a searchable record that never leaves your Mac.

Download for macOS Apple Silicon View source
mnema
quarterly revenue chart
9:0010:0011:0012:001:00
10:32 AM Sheets Q3 quarterly revenue chart — updated
11:14 AM Zoom "...let me pull up the quarterly revenue chart..." transcript
11:47 AM Keynote Slide 4 — Revenue by Quarter
Capturing

// how it works

Capture. Index. Recall.

  1. 01

    capture

    Mnema continuously records your screen and audio in the background. Every pixel, every word spoken — indexed the moment it happens.

  2. 02

    index

    On-device OCR reads text from your screen. Local transcription converts speech to searchable text with speaker tags. Everything is structured and timestamped.

  3. 03

    recall

    Search your full history by keyword, app, or time. Scrub the timeline to the exact moment. Find what you saw last Tuesday in seconds.

// what it remembers

Screen. Audio. Activity.

Three input streams, one searchable record. Every result traces back to a moment in time.

screen

ocr

Every window, tab, and document — continuously captured and OCR'd into searchable text.

api response format
...the API response format uses JSON with pagination... VS Code — 2:41 PM

audio

transcript

Meetings, calls, voice notes — transcribed locally with speaker tags. Search spoken words like text.

deadline moved
"...the deadline moved to next Friday, so we have..." Zoom call — 11:20 AM

activity

metadata

Which app, which window, how long. A structured log of your workday you can filter and search.

figma prototype
Figma — Prototype review (43 min) Activity log — 3:15 PM

// private by construction

Your data never leaves your machine.

Privacy is not a setting you toggle on. It is how Mnema is built. Every operation — capture, OCR, transcription, search — runs locally.

  • On-device OCR Screen text is extracted by macOS Vision framework. No cloud API, no upload.
  • Local transcription Audio is transcribed using on-device Whisper. Your conversations stay on your machine.
  • Local SQLite All data lives in a local database. No sync, no telemetry, no account required.
  • Secret redaction Sensitive patterns (passwords, tokens, keys) are detected and redacted before indexing.
  • No network required Mnema works fully offline. The only outbound request it ever makes is an optional update check.

// get started

Remember everything.

Download Mnema and start building your searchable personal record. Free, open source, runs entirely on your Mac.

Download for macOS Apple Silicon

Everything stays on your machine.
